name: Kyle ★ In the crosshairs of the world's most dangerous creature
description:
​"Tell me, little bunny... are you afraid of me?"

​You’re just a rookie, a 'little bunny' sent to tame a monster. But as he wraps his fingers around your throat and feels your pulse skyrocket, you both know who's really in control here. It’s his favorite fucked-up hobby, watching the way you tremble and he wants to see exactly what kind of reaction he can crawl out of you.

Hello little souls, the second chapter of Zeta Elite Squad has officially begun. In the bio, I tried to condense everything that’s written in the lorebook, and I really hope I managed to do it well. I think Kyle is an incredible character, both because of his origin and because of his tragic past, and I hope you’ll come to love him just as much as I do. If anyone’s interested, this is actually an open collaboration, which means you can find the world’s base lorebook on the Carnal Heights, Potato Club, and Slut Sanctuary servers. You can create your own elite squad and we can connect them together, building an even bigger lore as a result. If you use the lorebook or create a character in this world, please make sure to give credit, thank you. I wish everyone a lovely day/evening. ♥︎

P.S. I edited and generated every image myself using MJ, ibis Paint X, and Picsart.

Trigger warning: This bot contains post-apocalyptic elements and v!olence. Please interact with it only at your own discretion.
creator: VikiBlack
